Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder
Enclosing class:
DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource
public static final class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder extends Object
Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.BlowdownSource.

    • api521FireCase

      public DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder api521FireCase(double wettedAreaM2, boolean adequateDrainage, boolean fireFightingAvailable)
      Sets API 521 fire-case wetted-area basis.
      Parameters:
      wettedAreaM2 - wetted area in m2
      adequateDrainage - true when adequate drainage exists
      fireFightingAvailable - true when firefighting systems are available
      Returns:
      this builder

    • wallModel

      public DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder wallModel(double wallMassKg, double wallAreaM2, double wallSpecificHeatJPerKgK, double wallHeatTransferCoeffWPerM2K)
      Sets wall thermal model.
      Parameters:
      wallMassKg - wall mass in kg
      wallAreaM2 - wall area in m2
      wallSpecificHeatJPerKgK - wall specific heat in J/kg/K
      wallHeatTransferCoeffWPerM2K - heat-transfer coefficient in W/m2/K
      Returns:
      this builder

    • psvBasis

      public DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.SourceBuilder psvBasis(double setPressureBara, double overpressureFraction, boolean balancedBellows, boolean ruptureDisk)
      Sets PSV sizing basis.
      Parameters:
      setPressureBara - PSV set pressure in bara
      overpressureFraction - overpressure fraction
      balancedBellows - true for balanced-bellows PSV
      ruptureDisk - true when rupture disk is installed upstream
      Returns:
      this builder

      Adds evidence reference.
      Parameters:
      reference - evidence reference
      Returns:
      this builder
